# gpura gallery

> gpura gallery is an interactive discovery interface for Granthappura, a digital archive of books, periodicals, manuscripts, images, audio, and video related to Kerala across multiple languages and scripts.

## Recommended entry points
- /discover: crawlable archive landing page with direct links to records and browse pages
- /discover/type/book: books from the archive
- /discover/type/periodical: periodicals from the archive
- /discover/language/ml: Malayalam-language records
- /discover/language/en: English-language records

## Primary source
- https://gpura.org

## Notes
- Item pages at /{id} contain bibliographic metadata, source links, and reader access when available.
- The interactive homepage is optimized for visual exploration; use /discover for a text-forward entry point.
